name: io.github.askads/mcp-yandex-wordstat
title: Yandex Wordstat MCP
description: MCP server for Yandex Wordstat API: top & related queries, demand dynamics and regions.

environmentVariables.name: WORDSTAT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Yandex Cloud API key for the Search API (sent as Api-Key). Treat it as a secret.

environmentVariables.name: WORDSTAT_FOLDER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Yandex Cloud folder id, injected into every request body.
